changelog:
v1.0.0.X0 — 2026-03-23

FIXED
- _detect_platform_branch() now returns the correct release branch per platform (Windows_Release / MacOS_Release / Linux_release) instead of hardcoded TESTING-GENERAL.
- _REMOTE_SCRIPT_NAME simplified to v0rtex.py — conditional on TESTING branch no longer needed.
- Reinstall script: _PLATFORM_BRANCH resolved inline at runtime inside the generated script instead of at generation time, fixing NameError on first-run setup.
